Can LLM be a Personalized Judge?

Yijiang River Dong ∗

{yd358, th656, nhc30}@cam.ac.uk

University of Cambridge

Abstract
method: a subjective question and two distinct responses, we ask an LLM to infer the preference of a real user based on a user persona. We also ask the LLM to estimate its certainty level in this prediction.
